rows.label: qev041605_MSG0002
rows.name:
Only the stars know the whereabouts
of that which Borabora seeks, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041605_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hm? Did you need something
from this Borabora, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041605_MSG0004
rows.name:
Since you interrupted my dialogue with
the stars to speak to me, it must be
a matter of grave importance, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041605_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Oh, a Nopon courier was
attacked by some "huge thing"
and had his cargo stolen, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041605_MSG0006
rows.name:
That has absolutely nothing
to do with me, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041605_MSG0007
rows.name:
Is what I would like to say, but truthfully,
Borabora saw the entire sequence of events of
the cargo being stolen from right here, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041605_MSG0008
rows.name:
The one attacking the courier was... a
huge bird called a Hastara Booty, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041605_MSG0009
rows.name:
It is a surprisingly rare creature that
inhabits this area, and its appearance
is almost identical to an Aquila, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041605_MSG0010
rows.name:
There are parts of its body covered in
mushroom-like growths, and it attacks
with things that look like spores, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041605_MSG0011
rows.name:
Normally, they do not show
themselves in places where other
creatures are present, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041605_MSG0012
rows.name:
But this time it is their
mating season, and it seemed
to be in a very bad mood, mo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041605_MSG0013
rows.name:
After stealing the cargo, looking
from here... Hmm... I believe it
flew off towards the south, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041605_MSG0014
rows.name:
Borabora cannot find what I am searching for,
but since I can hear the voices of the stars,
there is no mistake regarding the direction, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041605_MSG0015
rows.name:
The Hastara Booty that stole
the cargo headed south, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041605_MSG0016
rows.name:
Oh, we meet again, mo? Do you perhaps
have a terrible sense of direction, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041605_MSG0017
rows.name:
The Hastara Booty flew off
towards the south, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041605_MSG0018
rows.name:
That is all I know, mo! Borabora is
busy looking for my own things, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041605_MSG0019
rows.name: This has nothing to do with me, mo~[ST:wait ]
